summary: Pin implementation-level cardinality when a semantic invariant spans parallel arrays or lockstep sets.
Pin agent tool surfaces and isolate concurrent subagents sharing a mutable substrate.
Require a derived artifact (worktree, snapshot, fork) to reflect the source it is checked against.
Require an extraction primitive over a prose document to name the adversarial substrings it must reject.
Require a new protection mechanism to name how the protected asset is legitimately developed thereafter.
Require a pre-deliver gate to be a superset of the post-deliver CI gate it precedes.
Require unbounded input flowing into a bounded medium such as argv to name the bound or passthrough.
Require a mechanism threat model to match what its enforcement layer can structurally deliver.
